|
|}

=== 1913–1923 ===

:All matches before the founding of [[Chinese Football Association]] in 1924 are not counted as A-level match by FIFA:

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center; font-size: 100%;"
|-
!Nations
!width=40|First Played
!width=30|Played
!width=30|Win
!width=30|Draw
!width=30|Loss
!width=35|Goals For
!width=35|Goals Against
!width=35|Goal Diff
!width=35|Win Percentage{{efn|name=1/2%}}
!Confederation
|- style="background:#fcc;"
|align=left|{{fb|Australia}}
|1923||6||1||1||4||9||19||−10||{{#expr: 1/6 * 100 round 2}}%
|[[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
|- style="background:#cfc;"
|align=left|{{fb|Japan}}
|1917||3||3||0||0||14||1||+13||{{#expr: 3/3 * 100 round 2}}%
|[[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
|- style="background:#ffc;"
|align=left|{{fb|Hong Kong|1876}}
|1923||1||0||1||0||1||1||0||{{#expr: 0/1 * 100 round 2}}%
|[[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
|- style="background:#cfc;"
|align=left|{{fb|Philippines|1919}}
|1913||10||6||2||2||15||6||+9||{{#expr: 6/10 * 100 round 2}}%
|[[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
|-
|align=center|'''Total (4)'''
|'''1913'''||'''20'''||'''10'''||'''4'''||'''6'''||'''39'''||'''27'''||'''+12'''||'''50%'''
|
|}

{{notelist}}

==Honours==
<!-- DO NOT ADD UNOFFICIAL OR FRIENDLY COMPETITIONS IN THE SUMMARY TABLE FOR OFFICIAL HONOURS ONLY -->

===Continental===
* '''[[AFC Asian Cup]]'''
** {{Silver2}} Runners-up (2): [[1984 AFC Asian Cup|1984]], [[2004 AFC Asian Cup|2004]]
** {{Bronze3}} Third place (2): [[1976 AFC Asian Cup|1976]], [[1992 AFC Asian Cup|1992]]
* '''[[Football at the Asian Games|Asian Games]]'''<sup>'''1'''</sup>
** {{Silver2}} Silver medal (1): [[Football at the 1994 Asian Games|1994]]
** {{Bronze3}} Bronze medal (2): [[Football at the 1978 Asian Games|1978]], [[Football at the 1998 Asian Games|1998]]

===Regional===
* '''[[EAFF E-1 Football Championship|EAFF East Asian Cup / EAFF E-1 Football Championship]]'''
** {{Gold1}} '''Champions (2)''': [[2005 East Asian Football Championship|2005]], [[2010 East Asian Football Championship|2010]]
** {{Silver2}} Runners-up (2): [[2013 EAFF East Asian Cup|2013]], [[2015 EAFF East Asian Cup|2015]]
** {{Bronze3}} Third place (6): [[2003 East Asian Football Championship|2003]], [[2008 East Asian Football Championship|2008]], [[2017 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2017]], [[2019 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2019]], [[2022 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2022]], [[2025 EAFF E-1 Football Championship|2025]]
* '''[[Football at the Far Eastern Games|Far Eastern Games]]'''
** {{Gold1}} '''Gold medal (9)''': [[Football at the 1915 Far Eastern Championship Games|1915]], [[Football at the 1917 Far Eastern Championship Games|1917]], [[Football at the 1919 Far Eastern Championship Games|1919]], [[Football at the 1921 Far Eastern Championship Games|1921]], [[Football at the 1923 Far Eastern Championship Games|1923]], [[Football at the 1925 Far Eastern Championship Games|1925]], [[Football at the 1927 Far Eastern Championship Games|1927]], [[Football at the 1930 Far Eastern Championship Games|1930]]{{sup|s}}, [[Football at the 1934 Far Eastern Games|1934]]
** {{Silver2}} Silver medal (1): [[Football at the 1913 Far Eastern Championship Games|1913]]

===Friendly===
* '''Dunhill Cup (1)''': [[1997 Dunhill Cup Malaysia|1997]]
* '''[[Four Nations Tournament (China)|Four Nations Tournament]] (2)''': [[2000 Four Nations Tournament (Guangzhou)|2000-I]], [[2000 Four Nations Tournament (Shanghai)|2000-II]]
* '''[[King's Cup (Thailand)|King's Cup]] (1)''': 1993
*'''[[Lunar New Year Cup]] (1)''': 1978
*'''[[Merlion Cup]] (1)''': 1986
*'''[[Quaid-e-Azam International Tournament]] (1)''': [[1986 Quaid-e-Azam International Tournament|1986]]

===Awards===
* '''[[FIFA World Rankings#Best Mover of the Year|FIFA Best Mover of the Year]] (1)''': 2004
* '''[[AFC Annual Awards#Team awards|AFC National Team of the Year]] (1)''': 2001
* '''[[AFC Asian Cup awards#Fair Play Award|AFC Asian Cup Fair Play Award]] (2)''': 1984, 2004

===Summary===
Only official honours are included, according to ''FIFA statutes'' (competitions organized/recognized by [[FIFA]] or an affiliated confederation).
{| class="wikitable" width=30% style="font-size:90%; text-align:center;"
|-
!Competition !!{{Gold1}} !!{{Silver2}} !!{{Bronze3}} !!Total
|-
|align=left|[[AFC Asian Cup]]
|0||2||2||4
|-
!Total!!0!!2!!2!!4
|}
;Notes:
# Competition organized by [[Olympic Council of Asia|OCA]], officially not recognized by FIFA.
* {{sup|s}} Shared titles.

* {{Cite journal |last1=Liu |first1=Zheng |last2=Chen |first2=Ryan |last3=Newman |first3=Joshua I. |date=February 2021 |title=The Football Dream of a Sleeping Dragon: Media Framing(s), East–West Geopolitics, and the Crisis of the Chinese Men's National Team |url=http://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/2167479519852141 |journal=Communication & Sport |language=en |volume=9 |issue=1 |pages=55–87 |doi=10.1177/2167479519852141 |s2cid=191740244 |issn=2167-4795|url-access=subscription }}
